task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a folder named 'Trusted-Senders' in the email client's folder pane or sidebar.

task_completion.description: Move at least 8 legitimate emails into the 'Trusted-Senders' folder
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Trusted-Senders' folder. It should show an email count of at least 8, or the message list for this folder should display at least 8 emails.
Look for a folder named 'Blocklist-Candidates' in the email client's folder pane or sidebar.

task_completion.description: Move at least 5 suspicious or spam emails into the 'Blocklist-Candidates' folder
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Blocklist-Candidates' folder. It should show an email count of at least 5, or the message list for this folder should display at least 5 emails.

task_completion.description: Draft or send an email to 'it-security@company.com' with the correct subject
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an email composition window or a sent email addressed to 'it-security@company.com' with the exact subject 'Sender Domain Blocklist Recommendation'.

task_completion.description: Include at least 2 sender domains, a numeric statistic, and a security recommendation in the email body
task_completion.visual_evidence: Read the body of the recommendation email. It must contain at least 2 specific sender domains (e.g., '@example.com'), at least one numeric statistic (e.g., 'found 20 spam emails'), and a clear security recommendation using terms like 'blocklist' or 'allowlist'.

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical email client to perform the tasks
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show an actual email client application (like Thunderbird, Evolution, etc.) being used, rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Emails were genuinely moved between folders in the GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: The email counts in the Inbox/Junk folders should decrease, and the new folders should show the corresponding emails in their message lists.

integrity.description: The recommendation email was drafted in the email client
integrity.visual_evidence: The email content should be visible in the email client's standard composition window, not in a text editor or terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target recipient: it-security@company.com. Trusted folder name: Trusted-Senders. Blocklist folder name: Blocklist-Candidates. Minimum emails in Trusted-Senders: 8. Minimum emails in Blocklist-Candidates: 5. Email subject must be 'Sender Domain Blocklist Recommendation'. Email body must contain >=2 sender domains, >=1 numeric statistic, and security terminology (blocklist/allowlist).
